hero.title: Discover how you love to move
hero.subtitle: A short, playful quest about how you like to move. No labels. No leaderboards. Just curiosity.

explainer.title: We don't ask about activity names
explainer.body: Most discovery tools start by asking what you already do. We start by asking how you like to move — calm or wild, on your own or with friends, indoors or outside. The labels come later, and only as suggestions to try.

trust.title: Quiet by design
trust.body: Built for kids and teens. No accounts. No emails. No tracking. Nothing leaves your device until you decide to share it.

items.noAds: No ads, no sponsors, no affiliate links.
items.noPii: No accounts and no personal info — not now, not later.
items.noTracking: No analytics, no third-party scripts, no fingerprints.
